现在我了解了sheet1表的基本结构和数据格式。我需要计算每个员工的有效工作时长、整体生产数量和生产质量，然后进行综合排名。首先，我需要计算每个员工的有效工作时长（标准工作时间减去离岗时间），然后计算每个员工的总产量和平均合格率。

让我先查看所有员工的统计数据，以便了解数据分布情况：
Action: local_db_sql(file_path="/data/yunyang/ferry_yunyang/evaluation/data/dacomp/tasks/dacomp-009/dacomp-009.sqlite", command="SELECT Employee, AVG(`Units Produced`) as avg_units, AVG(CAST(REPLACE(`Pass Rate`, '%', '') AS REAL)) as avg_pass_rate, COUNT(*) as days_worked, AVG(`Away-from-Station Count`) as avg_away_count, AVG(CAST(SUBSTR(`Total Time Away`, 1, INSTR(`Total Time Away`, 'min')-1) AS REAL)) as avg_away_minutes FROM sheet1 GROUP BY Employee ORDER BY avg_units DESC LIMIT 10;")
